Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway.reason: Discussion/Fig. 4g indicate ras1 acts downstream of RAB formation in conversion toward RAA.

Applied_Species_Variety.reason: The strain identifier 0617-T307 is explicitly used.

Omics_Data.reason: Genome data were deposited as GenBank CP151184.1 and BioProject PRJNA1094439.
